home.title: Tokensense-Ai | Contador de Tokens LLM Grátis e Calculadora de Custos de Prompt
home.description: Calcule os custos de prompts de IA instantaneamente. Estime o uso de tokens e os preços da API para GPT-5, Claude 3.5 e Gemini. 100% no lado do cliente, privado e sem necessidade de inscrição.
home.keywords: contador de tokens LLM, calculadora de custo de prompt, preços do GPT-5, ferramentas de desenvolvedor de IA, contagem de tokens do Claude, custo da API do Gemini
home.og_title: Tokensense-Ai | Calculadora de Custos de Prompt de IA
home.og_description: Saiba seus custos de API antes de enviar. Contagem de tokens 100% privada e no lado do cliente.
home.twitter_title: Tokensense-Ai | Contador de Tokens e Calculadora de Custos LLM
home.twitter_description: Estimativas de custo instantâneas para prompts do GPT, Claude e Gemini.

hero.badge: A única calculadora que simula custos de loops de agente
hero.subheadline: Saiba a contagem de tokens e os preços do GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5 e 50+ modelos antes de enviar.

calculator.compress_basic_desc: Remove espaços e quebras de linha. Minifica JSON. Muito seguro.
calculator.compress_advanced_desc: Remove estrutura Markdown e comentários. Verifique o resultado.

model_picker.placeholder: Selecione um modelo para ver o custo →

compare.title: Modo Comparação
compare.step_label: PASSO 02 — Compare seu modelo com 30+ opções
compare.step_desc: Adicione modelos para ver custos lado a lado para o mesmo prompt.
compare.enter_prompt: Insira um prompt para ver a comparação de custos.

smart_routing.title: Roteamento Inteligente
smart_routing.desc: Quer rodar {multiplier}x mais barato? Este prompt se encaixa no {model}.

shell.title: Video Token Budget Planner
shell.description: Estimate and compare AI video processing costs across providers.
shell.no_video_description: Upload a file or paste a URL on the left to start planning your token budget and comparing provider costs.
shell.privacy_description: Tokensense is a client-side tool. Your video data is processed locally in your browser for file uploads. API keys are stored in your browser's localStorage and are never sent to our servers. External URL analysis is performed via a secure proxy that does not store your content.
shell.methodology_description: Estimates are based on published tokenization rates for Gemini, Claude, and GPT-4o models. Actual costs may vary slightly based on specific prompt overhead and provider-side adjustments.

input.upload_description: Drag and drop or click to browse
input.url_placeholder: Paste YouTube, Vimeo, or direct video link...

config.title: Parameters
config.sampling_hint: Higher FPS increases visual detail but significantly increases token cost.
config.sampling_recommendation: 1 FPS is recommended for most tasks.

results.title: Analysis Results
results.pricing_disclaimer: Pricing last updated: March 2026. Includes input tokens only. Output costs vary by response length.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.privacy_description: Keys are saved in your browser's localStorage only. They are never sent to our servers. All provider calls happen directly from your browser.
keys.clear_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all saved API keys?
keys.exact_measure_hint: Connect a key to enable Exact Measurement mode.
